## Deep Audit V2: hx-tree-view

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-tree-view` component.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Tree role, treeitem roles, aria-expanded, keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Home/End).
